ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the object */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the object */,
  "z" INTEGER /* Z-coordinate of the object */,
  "rotations" INTEGER /* Rotation angle of the object */,
  "copies" INTEGER /* Number of copies of the object */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES object_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object version */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the object */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_access_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the design team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., lead designer, designer) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the member joined the team */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date and time the member left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES design_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being collaborated on */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team collaborating on the object */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_collaborations_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_collaborations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES design_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the detail belongs to */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being reported on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the object */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the tag is assigned to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_tags_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the comment is made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_comments_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the like is given to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the like */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_likes_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the object */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_downloads_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
